case_title: MAOZ, RONY DBA MDC DRILLING VS. GARY VARUM et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH MALLOY RE: SHAMROCK STRUCTURE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GARY VARUM AND MIKE SCULLEY NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
